_comment: Self-study corpus registry. Each entry is a candidate corpus for offline distillation
into ~/Edwin/memory/distilled/<id>.md -- synthesis notes + anticipated Q&A that chunk
retrieval can't answer on its own. The skill picks the STALEST entry per run:
never-distilled (last_distilled null) first, then largest overdue ratio
id           kebab-case corpus id -- becomes the distillate filename
paths        globs/paths to read (the corpus). ~ expands to $HOME.
queries      memory_search seed queries (limit 5 each) to pull cross-references
that live outside the globs (transcripts, mail, sessions).
last_distilled  ISO date of the last distillation run, or null (never).
The entries below are PLACEHOLDER EXAMPLES showing the schema. Replace them with
your own high-value corpora (a key project, a working relationship, an org history).

corpora.title: Example project -- full history, key decisions, current state, open questions
Example working relationship -- history, commitments, communication patterns
